$$
\{x\} + \{x^{3}\} + \{x^{5}\} + \cdots + \{x^{99}\} < \frac{1}{2^{99}}
$$

the fractional part of a number is the part of the number after the decimal point. for example, $ \{2.5\} = 0.5 $, $ \{3.7\} = 0.7 $, and $ \{1.999\} = 0.999 $. the fractional part of an integer is always 0, so if $ x $ is an integer, the fractional part of $ x^k $ is 0 for all $ k $.
